meta.title: Agent Harness Lab
meta.description: Learn and visualize coding agent harness architecture

home.hero_subtitle: Learn and visualize coding agent harness architecture, from tool loops to multi-agent coordination.
home.core_pattern_desc: Every AI coding agent shares the same loop: call the model, execute tools, feed results back. Production systems add policy, permissions, and lifecycle layers on top.
home.learning_path_desc: 12 progressive sessions, from a simple loop to isolated autonomous execution
home.layers_desc: Five orthogonal concerns that compose into a complete agent
home.message_flow_desc: Watch the messages array grow as the agent loop executes

timeline.title: Learning Path
timeline.subtitle: s01 to s12: Progressive Agent Design

dashboard.title: Harness Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Local task board, skill index, docs inventory, and runtime event log

demo.title: Agent Harness Lab Demo
demo.subtitle: A guided showcase that connects the agent learning path, local task runtime, paper assistant, and smart recipe assistant.
demo.dashboard_desc: Inspect local tasks, skill index, doc coverage, event timelines, and task dependency graphs.
demo.papers_desc: Upload or read PDF / Markdown / text papers and generate structured research reading reports.
demo.recipes_desc: Enter ingredients and constraints to generate recipe options, recommendation reasons, tool suggestions, and detailed steps.
demo.learning_desc: Follow s01 to s12 to understand agent loops, tool use, skills, context compaction, and multi-agent coordination.
demo.layers_desc: Understand the harness through tools, planning, memory, concurrency, and collaboration layers.
demo.cli_desc: Manage tasks, events, docs, skills, paper reports, and recipe options from the command line.
demo.screenshots_desc: Save the Dashboard, paper assistant, and recipe assistant screenshots into web/public/demo, and this section will show the real project UI.
demo.screenshot_dashboard_desc: Shows task counts, recent tasks, skill index, event logs, and runtime status.
demo.screenshot_papers_desc: Shows paper upload, CLI command hints, generated notes, and paper event sections.
demo.screenshot_recipes_desc: Shows browser-based ingredient input, multiple recipe options, and local JSON output flow.
demo.flow_seed_desc: Initialize task board and event log data so the Dashboard has something to visualize.
demo.flow_paper_desc: Convert a local paper file into a structured Markdown research note.
demo.flow_recipe_desc: Create multiple structured JSON recipes from ingredients and save them to recipes/output.
demo.flow_web_desc: Start the Next.js learning site and inspect the Dashboard, paper assistant, recipe assistant, and learning path.
demo.showcase_dashboard_desc: Tasks, events, dependencies, and skills show the runtime management side of the harness.
demo.showcase_paper_desc: The paper assistant shows how the same tool system can support graduate research reading.
demo.showcase_recipe_desc: The recipe assistant demonstrates multi-option recommendation, cooking tool selection, and detailed step generation.

papers.title: Paper Reading Assistant
papers.subtitle: Turn local paper PDFs, Markdown files, or text files into structured research reading reports.
papers.input_desc: Place paper files in the local input folder, or pass a file path directly in the command.
papers.output_desc: Notes are written to papers/output and can be synced into this page by the extraction script.
papers.empty_notes: No paper notes yet. Run papers read and then npm run extract.
papers.upload_title: Drop a paper file to generate a report
papers.upload_desc: Supports PDF, Markdown, and text files. Files are saved to local papers/input and converted into Markdown notes.
papers.uploading: Uploading and generating the paper report...

health.title: Health Record Assistant
health.subtitle: Turn health checkup PDFs, Markdown files, or text files into structured health information summaries.
health.safety_desc: This assistant is for organizing health information and learning only. It cannot replace diagnosis, treatment, or prescriptions from a licensed clinician. Seek medical care for acute symptoms, severe abnormalities, or uncertainty.
health.upload_title: Drop a health record to generate a summary
health.upload_desc: Supports PDF, Markdown, and text files. Files are saved to local health_records/input and converted into safety-bounded Markdown reports.
health.run_desc: The CLI reads a local health record and writes to health_records/output.
health.output_desc: Generated health reports are shown here and recorded in the event log.
health.empty_reports: No health reports yet. Run health analyze and then npm run extract, or upload a file above.

recipes.title: Smart Recipe Assistant
recipes.subtitle: Turn available ingredients, servings, time, and taste constraints into structured recipe cards.
recipes.generator_title: Generate a Recipe in the Browser
recipes.generator_desc: Enter available ingredients and cooking constraints. The page calls the local agent_lab backend, generates multiple structured JSON recipe options, and recommends suitable cooking tools automatically.
recipes.create_desc: The CLI writes recipes to recipes/output, and npm run extract syncs them into the Web page.
recipes.list_desc: Each JSON recipe is rendered here as ingredient tags, step timelines, shopping lists, and substitutions.
recipes.empty_reports: No recipes yet. Run recipes suggest and then npm run extract.

repos.title: GitHub Repository Insight Assistant
repos.subtitle: Enter a public GitHub repository URL and generate a structured technical analysis report for developers.
repos.generator_title: Generate a Repository Report in the Browser
repos.generator_desc: Enter a GitHub repository URL. The page calls the local agent_lab backend, fetches repository metadata, README content, language statistics, and file tree data, then writes a Markdown insight report.
repos.form_refresh: Refresh analysis instead of using the local cache
repos.progress_fetch: Fetch repository metadata, README, and file tree
repos.progress_analyze: Analyze project type, technology stack, and key modules
repos.progress_write: Generate the Markdown report and write it locally
repos.create_desc: The CLI writes Markdown reports to github_reports/output, and npm run extract syncs them into the Web page.
repos.list_desc: Generated repository reports are rendered here as a local history for comparing different projects.
repos.empty_reports: No repository reports yet. Run repos summarize and then npm run extract, or enter a repository URL above.
repos.empty_summary: No one-line summary was extracted for this report.

layers.title: Architectural Layers
layers.subtitle: Five orthogonal concerns that compose into a complete agent
layers.tools: What the agent CAN do. The foundation: tools give the model capabilities to interact with the world.
layers.planning: How work is organized. From simple todo lists to dependency-aware task boards shared across agents.
layers.memory: Keeping context within limits. Compression strategies that let agents work infinitely without losing coherence.
layers.concurrency: Non-blocking execution. Background threads and notification buses for parallel work.
layers.collaboration: Multi-agent coordination. Teams, messaging, and autonomous teammates that think for themselves.

compare.title: Compare Versions
compare.subtitle: See what changed between any two versions
compare.empty_hint: Select two versions above to compare them.
